nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the Prompt Optimizer, which analyzes user prompts against ECC components and rewrites them with intent detection, scope assessment, and model recommendations across a 5-phase pipeline.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive reference skill covering idiomatic Python development patterns including type hints, error handling, context managers, generators, decorators, concurrency, and package organization with anti-pattern guidance.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Exhaustive pytest-based testing skill covering TDD workflow, fixtures, parametrization, mocking, async testing, and test organization with configuration examples for Python projects.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill providing PyTorch best-practice patterns for device-agnostic code, model architecture, training loops, data pipelines, checkpointing, and performance optimization including mixed precision and torch.compile.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Domain-expert skill for quality and non-conformance management, covering NCR lifecycle, root cause analysis, CAPA systems, statistical process control, supplier quality, and escalation protocols.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Quarkus framework skill covering service layer patterns, Camel messaging, REST API structure, Panache repository, DTOs, async operations, caching, health checks, and Maven dependency configuration.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Quarkus security skill covering JWT authentication, RBAC, input validation, SQL injection prevention, password hashing, CORS, secrets management, rate limiting, security headers, and audit logging.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Full TDD workflow skill for Quarkus applications, covering unit tests with nested organization, Camel route testing, event service testing, CompletableFuture testing, REST Assured integration tests, and JaCoCo coverage configuration.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: 10-phase Quarkus verification loop skill covering build, static analysis, test coverage, security scanning, native compilation, performance testing, health checks, container image build, configuration validation, and documentation review.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Lightweight skill defining the Ralphinho RFC pipeline with staged spec templates, complexity tiers, quality gates, and merge queue rules for structured change proposals.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: React patterns skill covering hooks discipline, server/client component boundaries, Suspense, forms (including React 19 actions), data fetching, composition recipes, performance, accessibility, and routing guidance.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Prioritized React performance skill with 8 tiers from critical (waterfall elimination, bundle size) through advanced patterns, including RSC optimization, re-render reduction, rendering performance, and Web Vitals mapping.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: React testing skill based on Testing Library principles, covering query priority, userEvent interaction, async patterns, MSW network mocking, provider wrapping, custom hook testing, and accessibility assertions.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for recommender system pipeline architecture using a six-stage framework (retrieval through serving), surfacing trade-offs around scoring strategy, online/offline decisions, and anti-patterns.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill defining the Recursive Decision Ledger pattern for tracking and rolling up decisions through a coherence-marked ledger with promotion rules and structured summary output.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Redis patterns skill covering cache-aside, write-through, session storage, rate limiting (fixed and sliding window), distributed locks, pub/sub, streams, key naming conventions, connection pooling, cluster mode, and eviction policies.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for deciding when to use regex versus LLM for structured text parsing, presenting a hybrid pipeline with confidence scoring, a regex-first majority parser, and LLM fallback for edge cases.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Minimal skill stub describing when and how to use Remotion for programmatic video creation from React components.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for deep repository scanning and analysis, covering installation, core capabilities, analysis depth levels, and usage examples for understanding unfamiliar codebases.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Research operations skill with a structured 5-step workflow for evidence-based research: classify the ask, take the lightest evidence path, and report with explicit evidence boundaries while maintaining guardrails against hallucination.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Domain-expert skill for returns and reverse logistics management, covering returns policy, inspection grading, disposition decision trees, fraud detection, vendor recovery, warranty management, and escalation protocols.

nodes.name: scan-rules.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that enumerates rule Markdown files from a directory, extracts H2 heading indexes, and emits a structured JSON inventory used by the rules-distill skill.

nodes.name: scan-skills.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that enumerates SKILL.md files from global and project-level skill directories, extracts YAML frontmatter fields and mtimes, and emits a merged JSON skills inventory used by the rules-distill skill.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for distilling project rules and skills into a deduplicated inventory through a 3-phase pipeline: deterministic inventory collection via shell scripts, LLM-based cross-reading and verdict generation, and user-driven review and execution.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Rust development patterns skill covering ownership/borrowing, error handling with Result/thiserror/anyhow, enum pattern matching, traits/generics, structs, iterators, concurrency with Tokio, unsafe guidelines, and module organization.

nodes.name: extract_field
nodes.summary: Parses a YAML frontmatter field from a skill file using awk, handling both quoted and unquoted single-line values without support for multi-line YAML blocks.

nodes.name: get_mtime
nodes.summary: Returns a file's modification time as a UTC ISO8601 string, with portable support for both GNU stat (-c) and BSD stat (-f) variants.

nodes.name: scan_dir_to_json
nodes.summary: Scans a directory for SKILL.md files, extracts name, description, and mtime for each via helper functions, and returns a JSON array of skill objects.
